contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.

(** * The universe *)

(** ** Automorphisms of the universe *)

(** See "Parametricity, automorphisms of the universe, and excluded middle" by Booij, Escardó, Lumsdaine, Shulman. *)

(** If two inequivalent types have equivalent automorphism oo-groups, then assuming LEM we can swap them and leave the rest of the universe untouched. *)
(** Amusingly, this does not actually require univalence!  But of course, to verify [BAut A <~> BAut B] in any particular example does require univalence. *)
Context (A B : Type) (ne : ~(A <~> B)) (e : BAut A <~> BAut B).

refine (((equiv_decidable_sum (fun X:Type => merely (X=A)))^-1)
              oE _ oE
              (equiv_decidable_sum (fun X:Type => merely (X=A)))).

goals.conclusion:
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} + {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} + {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)}

contents:
refine ((equiv_functor_sum_l
               (equiv_decidable_sum (fun X => merely (X.1=B)))^-1)
              oE _ oE
              (equiv_functor_sum_l
                 (equiv_decidable_sum (fun X => merely (X.1=B))))).

goals.conclusion:
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
({x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} +
 {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}) <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
({x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} +
 {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})

{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}

{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

contents:
assert (q : BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} &
                                merely (x.1 = B)}).

goals.conclusion: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

goals.conclusion: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
BAut B <~> {a : Type & {p : ~ merely (a = A) & merely ((a; p).1 = B)}}
merely (X = B) <~> {p : ~ merely (X = A) & merely ((X; p).1 = B)}
merely (X = B) -> {p : ~ merely (X = A) & merely ((X; p).1 = B)}
{p : ~ merely (X = A) & merely ((X; p).1 = B)} -> merely (X = B)
merely (X = B) -> {p : ~ merely (X = A) & merely ((X; p).1 = B)}
{p : ~ merely (X = A) & merely ((X; p).1 = B)} -> merely (X = B)

{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} +
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} +
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

goals.conclusion:
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

goals.conclusion:
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} <~>
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)} <~>
{x : Type & merely (x = A)}

goals.conclusion:
{x : Type & merely (x = A)} <~>
{x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

hypotheses.type: BAut B <~> {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}

goals.conclusion:
((equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)))^-1
 oE (equiv_functor_sum_l
       (equiv_decidable_sum
          (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
         oE equiv_functor_sum_r
              ((e^-1
                oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                      (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} =>
                       merely (x.1 = B))
                    oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                         (fun X : Type =>
                          equiv_iff_hprop
                            (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                             (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                              Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                                (fun q0 : X = A =>
                                 Trunc_ind
                                   (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                                   (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                    match
                                      q0 in (_ = T)
                                      return
                                        (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                         BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                    with
                                    | 1%path =>
                                        fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                          (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                        ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                    end ne e)
                                   p)
                                q;
                             p))
                            pr2))^-1 +E
                equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne e)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2)
                oE e)
               oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                    {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
         oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
               {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
               {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
     oE equiv_functor_sum_l
          (equiv_decidable_sum
             (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
 oE equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A))) A =
B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((e^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne e)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne e)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE e)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) A) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((e^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne e)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne e)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE e)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

contents:
assert (ne' : ~ merely (B=A))
      by (intros p; strip_truncations; exact (ne (equiv_path A B p^))).

goals.conclusion:
(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((e^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne e)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne e)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE e)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((e^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne e)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne e)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE e)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
inr (B; ne')

inr
  ((e (A; tr 1)).1;
  fun q : Trunc (-1) ((e (A; tr 1)).1 = A) =>
  Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) ((e (A; tr 1)).1 = A) => Empty)
    (fun q0 : (e (A; tr 1)).1 = A =>
     Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) ((e (A; tr 1)).1 = B) => Empty)
       (fun p : (e (A; tr 1)).1 = B =>
        match
          q0 in (_ = T) return (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
        with
        | 1 =>
            fun (ne0 : ~ ((e (A; tr 1)).1 <~> B))
              (_ : BAut (e (A; tr 1)).1 <~> BAut B) =>
            ne0 (equiv_path (e (A; tr 1)).1 B p)
        end ne e)
       (e (A; tr 1)).2)
    q) =
inr (B; ne')

contents: rewrite p in q; exact q.
(** In particular, we can swap any two distinct rigid types. *)
(** In this case we get an untruncated witness of the swapping. *)

goals.conclusion: equiv_swap_rigid A B ne A = B
equiv_swap_rigid A B ne A = B

((equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)))^-1
 oE (equiv_functor_sum_l
       (equiv_decidable_sum
          (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
         oE equiv_functor_sum_r
              ((equiv_contr_contr^-1
                oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                      (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} =>
                       merely (x.1 = B))
                    oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                         (fun X : Type =>
                          equiv_iff_hprop
                            (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                             (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                              Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                                (fun q0 : X = A =>
                                 Trunc_ind
                                   (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                                   (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                    match
                                      q0 in (_ = T)
                                      return
                                        (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                         BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                    with
                                    | 1%path =>
                                        fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                          (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                        ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                    end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                                   p)
                                q;
                             p))
                            pr2))^-1 +E
                equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2)
                oE equiv_contr_contr)
               oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                    {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
         oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
               {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
               {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
     oE equiv_functor_sum_l
          (equiv_decidable_sum
             (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
 oE equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A))) A =
B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((equiv_contr_contr^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE equiv_contr_contr)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) A) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((equiv_contr_contr^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE equiv_contr_contr)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

contents:
assert (ne' : ~ merely (B=A))
    by (intros p; strip_truncations; exact (ne (equiv_path A B p^))).

goals.conclusion:
(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((equiv_contr_contr^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE equiv_contr_contr)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
equiv_decidable_sum (fun X : Type => merely (X = A)) B

(equiv_functor_sum_l
   (equiv_decidable_sum
      (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B)))^-1
 oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
       {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)}
     oE equiv_functor_sum_r
          ((equiv_contr_contr^-1
            oE (equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
                  (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
                oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                     (fun X : Type =>
                      equiv_iff_hprop
                        (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                         (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                          Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                            (fun q0 : X = A =>
                             Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                               (fun p0 : X = B =>
                                match
                                  q0 in (_ = T)
                                  return
                                    (~ (T <~> B) ->
                                     BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                                with
                                | 1%path =>
                                    fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                      (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                    ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                                end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                               p)
                            q;
                         p))
                        pr2))^-1 +E
            equiv_sigma_assoc (fun a : Type => ~ merely (a = A))
              (fun x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (x.1 = B))
            oE equiv_functor_sigma_id
                 (fun X : Type =>
                  equiv_iff_hprop
                    (fun p : merely (X = B) =>
                     (fun q : merely (X = A) =>
                      Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = A) => Empty)
                        (fun q0 : X = A =>
                         Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (X = B) => Empty)
                           (fun p0 : X = B =>
                            match
                              q0 in (_ = T)
                              return
                                (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
                            with
                            | 1%path =>
                                fun (ne0 : ~ (X <~> B))
                                  (_ : BAut X <~> BAut B) =>
                                ne0 (equiv_path X B p0)
                            end ne equiv_contr_contr)
                           p)
                        q;
                     p))
                    pr2)
            oE equiv_contr_contr)
           oE equiv_sum_symm {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
                {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)})
     oE (equiv_sum_assoc {x : Type & merely (x = A)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & merely (x.1 = B)}
           {x : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} & ~ merely (x.1 = B)})^-1)
 oE equiv_functor_sum_l
      (equiv_decidable_sum
         (fun X : {x : Type & ~ merely (x = A)} => merely (X.1 = B))))
  (inl (A; tr 1)) =
inr (B; ne')

inr
  (B;
  fun q : Trunc (-1) (B = A) =>
  Trunc_ind (fun _ : Trunc (-1) (B = A) => Empty)
    (fun q0 : B = A =>
     match
       q0 in (_ = T) return (~ (T <~> B) -> BAut T <~> BAut B -> Empty)
     with
     | 1 =>
         fun (ne0 : ~ (B <~> B)) (_ : BAut B <~> BAut B) =>
         ne0 (equiv_path B B 1)
     end ne equiv_contr_contr)
    q) =
inr (B; ne')

contents: (** We can also swap the products of two rigid types with another type [X], under a connectedness/truncatedness assumption. *)
(** Conversely, from some nontrivial automorphisms of the universe we can deduce nonconstructive consequences. *)

assert (q : Unit = P)
      by (apply path_universe_uncurried, equiv_contr_contr).

assert (q : f P = Empty)
      by (apply path_universe_uncurried, equiv_to_empty, nfp).
intros p; apply path_universe with snd.

goals.conclusion: (fun x : P * A => (p, snd x)) == idmap
(fun x : P * A => (p, snd x)) == idmap

contents:
Definition lem_from_aut_type_inhabited_empty `{Univalence}
           (f : Type <~> Type)
           (A : Type) (a : merely A) (eu : f A = Empty)
  : ExcludedMiddle_type.
assert (q := fst (equiv_hprop_idprod A P a) p).

(** If you can derive a constructive taboo from an automorphism of the universe such that [g X <> X], then you get [X]-many beers; see <https://groups.google.com/d/msg/homotopytypetheory/8CV0S2DuOI8/blCo7x-B7aoJ>. *)
